Vegetable oil is of great quality. The texture and consistency taste like a brand name. An excellent option for those of us trying to cut back on ridiculous brand-name, high-priced products. Walmart is better than any other brand, in my opinion. I have used this vegetable oil for baking brownies, cookies, and a specialty vegetable dish, and all came out amazingly good. Don't bother paying more when you can get great quality for less.

review_title: not all oil is created equal
review_body: This vegetable oil is a solid everyday staple. It has a neutral flavor that works well for cooking, baking, and frying without affecting the taste of food. It heats evenly and performs reliably whether I am sautéing, deep frying, or using it in recipes. The bottle size is convenient and lasts a while, and the pour is easy to control without making a mess. For the price, the quality is consistent and dependable. If you want a straightforward, affordable cooking oil that does exactly what it should, this one is a great value.

Vegetable oil is of great quality. The texture and consistency taste like a brand name. An excellent option for those of us trying to cut back on ridiculous brand-name, high-priced products. Don't bother paying more when you can get great quality for less.

review_body: This giant jug of Great Value vegetable oil is a crucial component of the college experience, specifically for deep-frying frozen chicken nuggets or attempting to make actual food for the first time. Thanks, Walmart, for providing the necessary fuel for his inevitable culinary disasters.
